title: Slay the Spire 2 delayed and now arrives March 2026 - nothing to do with Silksong
contents:
Slay the Spire 2 was originally due in Early Access this year, but the developers have announced it's moving into March 2026.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2025/09/slay-the-spire-2-delayed-and-now-arrives-march-2026-nothing-to-do-with-silksong/
